description_long: This object is a medium-sized bird with a slender, elongated body and a long, pointed tail. Its plumage is predominantly a rich reddish-brown on the back, wings, and tail, with a contrasting dark grayish-brown head and neck that are marked by white streaks and spots. The beak is straight, slender, and pointed, well-suited for probing or picking. The legs are relatively short and appear dark, blending with the underparts. The bird's wings are compact and the tail is notably long and slightly wedge-shaped, giving it a streamlined appearance. The overall feather pattern is a mix of solid colors and fine streaks, especially prominent on the head and upper chest.
description: A slender, reddish-brown bird with a long, pointed tail and streaked grayish head. Its plumage features white spots and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, reddish-brown back, and streaked grayish head with a pointed beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the long, slightly wedge-shaped tail and the compact arrangement of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same reddish-brown plumage and streaked head, with visible slender legs.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed beak, streaked head, and the symmetry of the body and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: streaked head and chest with solid reddish-brown back and wings, white spots on underparts
